+## Strategy
+- Phase 1 (Weeks 18-20): TEST CONVERSION at T3//5 promo
+  - If works: scale S1 acquisition, grow to 200+ subs
+  - If fails: cut ALL spending, go pure survival mode
+- Phase 2 (Weeks 21-30): If growing, reinvest in more ad channels/groups
+- Phase 3 (Weeks 30+): If not growing, minimize burn to extend runway
+- ENDGAME: Maximize cash at game end
